summary: Measure a finished master's delivery NUMBERS — integrated loudness, true-peak, LRA (ffmpeg loudnorm analysis) and colour tag + video bitrate (ffprobe). Numbers only; the pass/fail verdict is the brain's.

parity.note: ffmpeg's loudnorm analysis pass and ffprobe report the same values for identical input bytes on a pinned build; a fractional-dB jitter across ffmpeg minors is far below any verdict band, so numeric(0.5) is the honest mode for a MEASUREMENT. Critically, NO THRESHOLD is measured here — this op returns raw values and check_master.gate() (on the brain, reading the brand's own delivery target) decides ok/off/?. Shaped like cp_infer: numbers cross, judgement does not.
